name: areal-msig
description: Self-contained CLI for creating, approving and executing Areal Finance protocol operations through a Squads v4 multisig.

comments.overrides.rpc-websockets: Pinned to 7.5.1 because @solana/web3.js 1.91.8 expects the v7 API; newer rpc-websockets (8.x) breaks the WebSocket export and crashes Connection setup on Node 20. See project-squads-web3-rpc-websockets memory.
